Plot an hv_nnt object

Source: R/hazard-plot.R
plot.hv_nnt.Rd

Renders a bare ggplot2::ggplot() NNT (or ARR) curve from an hv_nnt() object.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'hv_nnt'
plot(x, ci_alpha = 0.2, line_width = 1, ...)

Arguments

x

An hv_nnt object from hv_nnt().

ci_alpha

Transparency of the CI ribbon. Default 0.20.

line_width

Line width. Default 1.0.

...

Ignored.

Value

A ggplot2::ggplot() object.

See also

hv_nnt(), hv_survival_difference(), hv_theme()

On this page
